formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\omega_{q} + \underset{e^{j , t} \in R_{e^{j}}}{\sum} \left(r_{e^{j , t}} + \bar{\kappa^{j , t}}\right) \leq \underset{e^{i , t} \in R_{e^{i}}}{\sum} \left(r_{e^{i , t}} + \bar{\kappa^{i , t}}\right) + \left(1 - \zeta_{q}\right) \times M \\ \omega_{q} + \underset{e^{i , t} \in R_{e^{i}}}{\sum} \left(r_{e^{i , t}} + \bar{\kappa^{i , t}}\right) \leq \underset{e^{j , t} \in R_{e^{j}}}{\sum} \left(r_{e^{j , t}} + \bar{\kappa^{j , t}}\right) + \zeta_{q} \times M \\ \forall q = \left(e^{i} , e^{j}\right) \in A_{a r r}^{H} \cup A_{d e p}^{H}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\omega_{q} + r_{e^{j , t}} \leq r_{e^{i , t}} + \left(3 - \lambda_{e^{i , t}} - \lambda_{e^{j , t}} - \zeta_{q}\right) \times M \\ \omega_{q} + r_{e^{i , t}} \leq r_{e^{j , t}} + \left(2 - \lambda_{e^{i , t}} - \lambda_{e^{j , t}} + \zeta_{q}\right) \times M \\ \forall q = \left(e^{i , t} , e^{j , t}\right) \in A_{p l a t}^{H}\end{matrix}

formulas.label: fd20
formulas.latex: \begin{matrix}\omega_{q_{1}} \times \underset{t \in R_{e}^{r}}{\sum} \lambda_{e^{t}} \leq \underset{e^{i , t} \in R_{e^{i}}}{\sum} \left(r_{e^{i , t}} + \overset{\leftrightarrow}{\kappa^{i , t}}\right) - \underset{e^{j , t} \in R_{e^{j}}}{\sum} \left(r_{e^{j , t}} + \overset{\leftrightarrow}{\kappa^{j , t}}\right) + \left(1 - \zeta^{q_{1}}\right) \times M \\ \omega_{q_{2}} \times \underset{t \in R_{e}^{r}}{\sum} \lambda_{e^{t}} \leq \underset{e^{j , t} \in R_{e^{j}}}{\sum} \left(r_{e^{j , t}} + \overset{\leftrightarrow}{\kappa^{j , t}}\right) - \underset{e^{i , t} \in R_{e^{i}}}{\sum} \left(r_{e^{i , t}} + \overset{\leftrightarrow}{\kappa^{i , t}}\right) + \left(1 - \zeta^{q_{2}}\right) \times M \\ \forall q_{1} = \left(e^{i} , e^{j}\right) \in A_{\overset{⃖}{r r}}^{H} , q_{2} = \left(e^{j} , e^{i}\right) \in A_{\overset{⃗}{r r}}^{H}\end{matrix}

formulas.latex: \left\{\begin{matrix} min J^{'} = \underset{e \in E^{s}}{\sum} \left(\underset{e^{t} \in R_{e}}{\sum} r_{e^{t}} - P_{e}\right) \\ + \underset{\upsilon = \left(q_{1} , q_{2}\right) \in Y_{r}^{o}}{\sum} \left[\theta_{\upsilon}^{1} \left(\zeta_{q_{1}} + \zeta_{q_{2}} - 1\right) + \frac{\rho_{\upsilon}^{1}}{2} \left[\zeta_{q_{1}} + \zeta_{q_{2}} - 1\right]^{2}\right] \\ + \underset{\upsilon = \left(q_{1} , q_{2}\right) \in Y_{r r}}{\sum} \left[\theta_{\upsilon}^{2} \left(\zeta_{q_{1}} - \zeta_{q_{2}}\right) + \frac{\rho_{\upsilon}^{2}}{2} \left[\zeta_{q_{1}} - \zeta_{q_{2}}\right]^{2}\right] \\ s . t . \left(C_{m p c}\right) , \left(C_{d}\right) & \\ \forall e \in E^{s} , r_{e^{t}} \in N , \lambda_{e^{t}} \in 0 , 1 \\ \forall q \in A , \tau_{q} , \gamma_{q} , \zeta_{q} \in 0 , 1 & \end{matrix}\right
